name: twitter_search
description: Search Twitter/X for keywords using advanced search syntax, fetch up to 1000 relevant tweets, and generate professional data analysis reports with insights and actionable recommendations. Use this when user requests Twitter social media search, social media trend analysis, tweet data mining, social listening, influencer identification, topic sentiment analysis, or any task involving gathering and analyzing Twitter data.

query.description: Search query using Twitter advanced search syntax (e.g., 'AI', 'from:elonmusk', 'Bitcoin since:2024-01-01', '"ChatGPT" OR "Claude AI" lang:en filter:verified')

max_results.description: Maximum tweets to fetch (default: 1000, API limit)

query_type.description: Sort order: 'Top' for relevance, 'Latest' for chronological

format.description: Output format: 'json' for raw tweet data, 'summary' for analysis report with statistics
